question: How do you install the card into a camera before photography?
content:
1. Open the CF card slot cover by sliding the cover in the direction shown by the arrow.<PIC>
2. Hold the CF card with the label side facing you, then insert the end with the small holes into the camera; the CF card eject button should pop out. Insert it only in this orientation because inserting it the wrong way can damage the camera.<PIC>
3. Close the cover and slide it in the arrow direction until it snaps shut.<PIC>
When the power switch is set to <ON> or the Quick Control Dial position, the LCD panel displays the remaining shots.
ret:
"1. Open the CF card slot cover by sliding the cover in the direction shown by the arrow.<PIC>
2. Hold the CF card with the label side facing you, then insert the end with the small holes into the camera; the CF card eject button should pop out. Insert it only in this orientation because inserting it the wrong way can damage the camera.<PIC>
3. Close the cover and slide it in the arrow direction until it snaps shut.<PIC>
When the power switch is set to <ON> or the Quick Control Dial position, the LCD panel displays the remaining shots.",["Manual10_25", "Manual10_26", "Manual10_27"]
notes: The manual's Installing the Card section gives the cover-opening step, CF card orientation and damage warning, eject-button confirmation, and cover-closing/shots-remaining confirmation.
